title: TMDB Movie VAD + Emotion Intensity Scores
subtitle: NRC VAD v2.1 + emotion intensity for 1.24M TMDB movies (no adult content)
description:
## TMDB Movie Emotional Feature Matrix

All 24 original TMDB columns (~1.38M movies) enriched with 12 affective scores derived from movie keywords using NRC lexicons by Saif M. Mohammad (National Research Council Canada).

### Scored Columns

| Column | Source | Description |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| sentiment | derived | positive / negative / neutral / unknown |
| valence | NRC VAD v2.1 | positivity of keyword associations (-1 to +1) |
| arousal | NRC VAD v2.1 | energy/activation level (-1 to +1) |
| dominance | NRC VAD v2.1 | sense of control/power (-1 to +1) |
| anger … trust | NRC Intensity | mean emotion intensity across keywords (0–1) |

Column order: identity (id, title, keywords) → emotion scores → remaining TMDB metadata.

### Filtering

Adult-labeled movies (`adult=True`) are excluded from this dataset (~10% of raw TMDB data). All remaining ~1.24M movies are included regardless of keyword coverage.

### Pipeline

```
TMDB keywords → phrase lookup (NRC VAD v2.1 MWE) → tokenize → lemmatize → NRC lookup → average per movie
```

Source: https://github.com/bdelanghe/imdb-kaggle

### Data Sources

- TMDB Movies Dataset (input): https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/asaniczka/tmdb-movies-dataset-2023-930k-movies

### Lexicon Sources

- NRC Emotion Lexicon: https://saifmohammad.com/WebPages/NRC-Emotion-Lexicon.htm
- NRC Emotion Intensity Lexicon: https://saifmohammad.com/WebPages/AffectIntensity.htm
- NRC VAD Lexicon: https://saifmohammad.com/WebPages/nrc-vad.html
- All NRC lexicons: https://saifmohammad.com/WebPages/lexicons.html

### Methodological Notes (Mohammad, 2020)

Scores represent **perceived emotional word associations** — not ground-truth movie sentiment.
- Scores are relative, not absolute (valence 0.7 = "more positive than 0.6", not "70% positive")
- Association ≠ denotation ("party" associates with joy but does not mean joy)
- ~75% of rows have no TMDB keywords and are scored as unknown

Correct: *"Movies with these keywords contain more joy-associated language"* — not *"this movie is joyful."*

### Future Work

Warriner VAD · ANEW · LIWC · SenticNet · MovieLens Tag Genome

### Known Limitation

Token-level averaging on a bipolar scale is lossy for phrases not in the MWE lexicon. When a keyword phrase is not found as an MWE, it is tokenized and each token's bipolar score is averaged independently. This can wash out signal -- 'not happy' averages a negative and a positive rather than composing correctly. See: Mohammad et al., [Sentiment Composition of Words with Opposing Polarities (SCL)](https://www.saifmohammad.com/WebPages/SCL.html).

resources.description: 1.38M TMDB movies — all 24 original columns plus 16 derived columns (4 keyword groups + 12 NRC emotion/VAD scores). Column order: id, title, keywords, keyword groups, emotion scores, then remaining TMDB metadata.

fields.name: positive_keywords
fields.description: Comma-separated keywords whose NRC VAD v2.1 valence >= 0 (positive-associated)

fields.name: negative_keywords
fields.description: Comma-separated keywords whose NRC VAD v2.1 valence < 0 (negative-associated)

fields.name: unknown_keywords
fields.description: Comma-separated keywords with no NRC VAD v2.1 coverage

fields.name: sentiment
fields.description: Derived label: positive (valence>0), negative (valence<0), neutral (valence=0), unknown (no keywords)

fields.name: valence
fields.description: NRC VAD v2.1: mean keyword valence (-1=negative, +1=positive, 0=neutral). Bipolar scale.

fields.name: arousal
fields.description: NRC VAD v2.1: mean keyword arousal (-1=calm, +1=excited)

fields.name: dominance
fields.description: NRC VAD v2.1: mean keyword dominance (-1=submissive, +1=powerful)

fields.name: anger
fields.description: NRC Intensity: mean anger intensity across keywords (0–1)

fields.name: anticipation
fields.description: NRC Intensity: mean anticipation intensity across keywords (0–1)

fields.name: disgust
fields.description: NRC Intensity: mean disgust intensity across keywords (0–1)

fields.name: fear
fields.description: NRC Intensity: mean fear intensity across keywords (0–1)

fields.name: joy
fields.description: NRC Intensity: mean joy intensity across keywords (0–1)

fields.name: sadness
fields.description: NRC Intensity: mean sadness intensity across keywords (0–1)

fields.name: surprise
fields.description: NRC Intensity: mean surprise intensity across keywords (0–1)

fields.name: trust
fields.description: NRC Intensity: mean trust intensity across keywords (0–1)

fields.name: backdrop_path
fields.description: Backdrop image path on TMDB CDN

fields.name: poster_path
fields.description: Poster image path on TMDB CDN

fields.name: keywords
fields.description: Comma-separated TMDB plot keywords — source for all emotion scores below
